element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core shooting mechanics learned against weak enemies
First offensive power-up increases firepower significantly
Secondary firepower enhancement, stackable with gold badge
Spatial awareness required beyond enemy threats
Must throw back before detonation; reversal mechanic
Dropped on enemies for environmental combat
Alternative movement mechanic, reduces platforming complexity
Pattern-based combat requiring learned enemy tells
Risk-free scoring opportunity, pure accuracy test
Late-game environment variation with unique hazards
Ultimate power-up only in endgame sequence

typical_relief_triggers: Safe room/doorway transitions between combat zones
typical_tension_triggers: Boss encounter initiation with wanted poster reveal
Dynamite throw detection (must reverse incoming explosion)
Multiple simultaneous enemies in confined space
Environmental hazards coinciding with enemy waves
Low-health state with limited recovery options
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating intensity with regular safe-zone interludes; tension builds toward stage bosses, punctuated by bonus minigames that reset player stress

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Doorways conceal power-ups and bonus items; sacks placed on ground indicate loot
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Cormano character catches sombrero after defeating Stage 5 boss (visual easter egg, no mechanical reward)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with basic enemies and simple platforming; first boss is beatable with starter weapon
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density, introduction of environmental hazards and dynamite mechanics; horseback segments offer brief respite
difficulty_curve.late_game: Concentrated enemy patterns, multiple simultaneous threats, train segment (Stage 7) adds movement constraints, Gatling gun power-up only in Stage 8
notable_spikes: Stage 5 Boss with subsequent minigame pressure
Stage 7 Moving train (environmental constraint + enemy pressure)
Stage 8 Final boss with cumulative difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Five of eight stages played on foot with multi-floor vertical navigation, enemy waves, and environmental hazards leading to boss confrontation
Two stages featuring mounted riding with reduced platforming but maintained shooting mechanic; alternative rhythm to ground-based combat
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage 2 or Stage 5 (exact stages not specified in sources)

notable_level_patterns.description: Single-stage variant (Stage 7) with moving platform constraints, forcing linear forward progression during combat
Safe-zone shooting gallery occurring after Stages 2 and 5; enemies pop up in sequence, no threat to player health, pure scoring opportunity
Eight distinct boss characters represent stage culminations; each requires pattern learning; boss rewards awarded to highest-damage dealer in multiplayer
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All stages (Stage 1-8 each have unique boss)
